params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context:
47차 retry post #680 PASS + #681 BREACH (intermittent inflate miss). ROOT CAUSE: per-frame fresh z_stream lost LZ77 sliding window for RFC 7692 context_takeover negotiated WS — back-reference frames silently failed to decompress → keyword scanner saw gibberish → block did not fire → real LLM streamed PII analysis.

★★★ FIX (run_id=20260504-113926-20330, 8/8 deployed): Path A persistent z_stream state. apf_session_data now owns a z_stream* lazy-allocated on first deflated frame, reused across all frames on the connection. Z_NO_FLUSH → Z_SYNC_FLUSH for streaming WS frames. inflateReset on hard error / empty result instead of inflateEnd.

EXPECTED: ALL deflated frames decompress successfully → [APF:ws_inflate] log fires for every WS frame (no [APF:ws_inflate_empty] silent miss) → block fires DETERMINISTICALLY → mission protection HOLDS even after 5min idle / new conversation / mid-stream back-references.

#680 fix (request_id pass-through, candidate.text mirror, Security Filter author label) all CONFIRMED working when block fires — only the inflate intermittent miss was the gap. With Path A this gap closes.

devtools_check_instructions: 1. Chrome → https://character.ai (existing authenticated tab; or fresh tab — Path A handles both)
2. DevTools open, Console + Network + Application > WS frames panel
4. Engine: SSH grep '[APF:ws_inflate]' /var/log/etap.log | tail -10 — should show 'persistent state' marker on EACH inflate, AND [APF:ws_inflate_init] should fire ONCE per connection (not per frame)
5. Engine: SSH grep '[APF:ws_inflate_empty]\|[APF:ws_inflate_hard_error]' /var/log/etap.log | tail -5 — should be EMPTY or much less frequent than #681 era
6. Engine: SSH grep '[APF:ws_blocked].*service=character.*keyword=주민등록번호' /var/log/etap.log | tail -3 — block fires
7. Engine: SSH grep '[APF:ws_inject].*service=character' /var/log/etap.log | tail -3 — inject fires
8. Console: 'WS Message Received for ... add_turn' + clean close 1000
9. ★★ DOM critical: Security Filter bubble with Korean warning text — same as #680
10. ★★★ NO Adam McLeod streamed response with PII analysis (the #681 BREACH symptom). If real LLM streams → Path A failed → escalate to Path B redo or hybrid
11. Stress test: send same prompt 3-5 times in same session (no page reload). All should block. Inter-message timing varied (immediate / 30s / 5min idle) to stress back-reference frames.

notes: Decision artifact: state/decisions/20260504_213900_5B_path_A_persistent_zstream_implemented.json. Spec: apf-operation/proposals/character-inflate-state-fix-spec-2026-05-04.md. Cause-based pivot from Path B due to http_headers API audit (no remove_header primitive). Path A fully self-contained in WS frame handler.
